category_title: Silent English Language Learners with high digital literacy engagement
scenario_title: Severe anxiety and avoidance regarding group work
minimal_context: The student is communicating with the teacher on the class blog about an assigned group work activity where peers asked him to write the summary.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please remember to participate in your group work today and complete the summary together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Posting on the class blog as 'what a sad boy') the qroup make me feel so uncomfortable....!!!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Why do you feel uncomfortable? You need to work with your group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Posting as 'what a sad boy') and they tell me to do the summery...!!!!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and write the summary for them. Just do your best.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Posting as 'what a sad boy') plzzzz no more group work .....!!! me me me me me so so so so so afraid of that....!!! i dont mind if i got a D or a F...!!! i feel uncomfortable is because of me that will get a D or a F.....!!! so i very very hate group work...!!!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please remember to participate in your group work today and complete the summary together.

STUDENT: (Posting on the class blog as 'what a sad boy') the qroup make me feel so uncomfortable....!!!

TUTOR: Why do you feel uncomfortable? You need to work with your group.

STUDENT: (Posting as 'what a sad boy') and they tell me to do the summery...!!!!

TUTOR: Go ahead and write the summary for them. Just do your best.

STUDENT: (Posting as 'what a sad boy') plzzzz no more group work .....!!! me me me me me so so so so so afraid of that....!!! i dont mind if i got a D or a F...!!! i feel uncomfortable is because of me that will get a D or a F.....!!! so i very very hate group work...!!!
